background_setting: Picturesque park with lush green lawn, colorful flowers, scattered trees, open sunny space, and warm golden rays moving across the grass.

lighting.conditions: Bright overhead sunlight with warm highlights on grass, clothing, fur, and flowers.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source

lighting.illumination_effect: Bright overhead sunlight with warm highlights on grass, clothing, fur, and flowers.

aesthetics.composition: Cheerful family-park realism, saturated greens, red and blue clothing accents, golden fur, and sunny carefree motion.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Cheerful family-park realism, saturated greens, red and blue clothing accents, golden fur, and sunny carefree motion.

artistic_style: Warm joyful outdoor realism with playful movement and bright natural color.
context: A little boy runs across a sunny park lawn while a golden retriever follows close behind, both enjoying the open day.

actions.description: The boy bursts across the green lawn in a red t-shirt as the golden retriever starts after him.
The dog bounds closer, tail wagging, while the boy laughs and glances back over his shoulder.
They continue across the sunlit grass together, flowers and trees glowing in the background.

segments.description: Introduce the boy sprinting onto the lush lawn with the dog following.
segments.key_changes: Grass bends under quick steps, sunlight flashes on the red shirt and golden fur.

segments.description: Follow the playful chase across the park.
segments.key_changes: Dog tail wags faster, boy laughs and turns his face back, flowers pass in soft blur.
segments.camera: Smooth side-tracking camera at child height.

segments.description: Hold the joyful run as both subjects move deeper into the sunny park.
segments.key_changes: Their pace stays lively, warm light broadens across the lawn.
segments.camera: Slight widening shot keeping both centered.

temporal_caption: A laughing little boy in a red t-shirt runs across a sunny green park lawn while a playful golden retriever bounds after him.
audio_description: Child laughter, light dog panting, paws and footsteps through grass, faint birds, and soft park breeze.
